case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $672.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $672.00  U.S. CURRENCY, DOES 1 TO THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA TIMS, TANIETSHA N.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $672.00  U.S. CURRENCY, $336.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $336.00, - JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS DECLARED FORFEITED. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FUTHER LIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
